item.title: Adding a Pineapple Twist to a Fire Poker
item.description: Watch as a classic fire poker gets a decorative pineapple twist. A detailed blacksmithing process that blends function with eye-catching design.

media:content.media:title: Adding a Pineapple Twist to a Fire Poker
media:content.media:description: Watch as a classic fire poker gets a decorative pineapple twist. A detailed blacksmithing process that blends function with eye-catching design.

item.title: Historical Tools: Viking Spoon Auger
item.description: Explore historical toolmaking as we craft a Viking spoon auger, showcasing traditional forging techniques and the function of this unique woodworking tool.

media:content.media:title: Historical Tools: Viking Spoon Auger
media:content.media:description: Explore historical toolmaking as we craft a Viking spoon auger, showcasing traditional forging techniques and the function of this unique woodworking tool.

item.title: Forging an Axe from Steel Cable
item.description: Watch the process of forging an axe from twisted steel cable, transforming raw strands into a functional cutting edge through heat, hammering, and skill.

media:content.media:title: Forging an Axe from Steel Cable
media:content.media:description: Watch the process of forging an axe from twisted steel cable, transforming raw strands into a functional cutting edge through heat, hammering, and skill.

item.title: How to Forge Like the Vikings
item.description: Discover traditional techniques inspired by Viking-era blacksmithing, from forge welding to shaping steel, and learn how to craft tools the old-world way.

media:content.media:title: How to Forge Like the Vikings
media:content.media:description: Discover traditional techniques inspired by Viking-era blacksmithing, from forge welding to shaping steel, and learn how to craft tools the old-world way.

item.title: Toolbox Staples: Making a Claw Hammer
item.description: See how a classic claw hammer is forged and shaped, covering key blacksmithing steps to create a durable, reliable toolbox staple from raw steel.

media:content.media:title: Toolbox Staples: Making a Claw Hammer
media:content.media:description: See how a classic claw hammer is forged and shaped, covering key blacksmithing steps to create a durable, reliable toolbox staple from raw steel.

item.title: Toolbox Staples: Making a Claw Hammer
item.description: Follow the process of forging a claw hammer from raw steel, showcasing shaping, heat treatment, and finishing techniques to create a dependable workshop essential.

media:content.media:title: Toolbox Staples: Making a Claw Hammer
media:content.media:description: Follow the process of forging a claw hammer from raw steel, showcasing shaping, heat treatment, and finishing techniques to create a dependable workshop essential.

item.title: Wood Stove for Shop Heating
item.description: Discover how a wood stove can efficiently heat a workshop, providing warmth and comfort while working in cold conditions with a simple and reliable setup.

media:content.media:title: Wood Stove for Shop Heating
media:content.media:description: Discover how a wood stove can efficiently heat a workshop, providing warmth and comfort while working in cold conditions with a simple and reliable setup.

item.title: A Tool for the Ancient Art of Fire Starting
item.description: Explore an ancient fire-starting tool, demonstrating traditional techniques to create sparks, ignite tinder, and connect with the primal art of making fire.

media:content.media:title: A Tool for the Ancient Art of Fire Starting
media:content.media:description: Explore an ancient fire-starting tool, demonstrating traditional techniques to create sparks, ignite tinder, and connect with the primal art of making fire.
